facilities.name: Durham Waste Disposal and Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Durham lists the Waste Disposal and Recycling Center as open Tuesday through Saturday, 7:30 AM to 4:00 PM. Confirm holiday schedules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Fees vary by load type, volume, and residency. Check Durham's current center rules before you drive.
facilities.rules: Review Durham's latest disposal and recycling guidance for accepted materials, fees, and resident requirements before arriving.

facilities.name: Durham Household Hazardous Waste Facility
facilities.hours: Durham lists the household hazardous waste facility at the same East Club Boulevard campus. Confirm current HHW days and hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste service is resident-focused. Confirm current eligibility, quantity limits, and accepted materials before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use Durham's current HHW guidance to confirm accepted items, proof-of-residency rules, and packaging instructions before you drive.

facilities.name: Durham Yard Waste Facility
facilities.hours: Durham lists the yard waste facility at the Waste Disposal and Recycling Center campus. Confirm current public hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Yard waste service may be resident-focused or load-specific. Confirm current charges and material rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: Separate yard waste from trash and review Durham's current facility instructions before using the site.
